Import a Test/Quiz File to Schoology & Create and Utilize Question Banks

By JONATHAN FROELICH

→

Go to Admin Task Manager Tool - Project Settings - Apps Script

https://script.google.com/u/0/home/projects/10z4Ou9XkI3Wgz5LmHDmyfk2tuI4MHdYUh5KF7jYF04sFe759z1y0o90J/settings

1

Click "Log uncaught exceptions to Cloud logs"

2

Click "Log uncaught exceptions to Cloud logs"

3

Click "info_outlineOverview codeEditor historyProject History alarm"

→

Go to Weekday 2-Hour Daily Dig Logger - Google Workspace Studio

https://studio.workspace.google.com/workflow/pc0e1119a3f72c1f8581dea28512b5ff6?fromSource=6

4

Click the "Studio" link

→

Go to Discover - Google Workspace Studio

https://studio.workspace.google.com/

5

Click the "Flows" link

→

Go to Flows - Google Workspace Studio

https://studio.workspace.google.com/manage

6

Click the "Manage flow Weekday 2-Hour Daily Dig Logger" button

7

Click "edit Edit content_copy Make a copy timeline Activity delete "
